config.name: beyondtrust_privilegemgmtwindows_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: beyondtrust_privilegemgmtwindows_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Privilege Access Management (3005)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:14:41.291439

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_string(str)
    return type(str) == "string" and str ~= ""
end

local function validate_number(num)
    return type(num) == "number" and num > 0
end

-- Field transformation cache
local field_cache = {}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with detailed error message
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, string_format("Invalid input record type: %s", type(record))
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with pre-allocated structure
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3005,
        class_name = "Privilege Access Management", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 300501,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "BeyondTrust Privilege Management",
                vendor = "BeyondTrust"
            }
        },
        user = {},
        device = {},
        access = {}
    }

    -- Optimized field transformations using local references
    local access_time = record.access_activity and record.access_activity.time_dt
    if access_time then
        -- Cache timestamp parsing
        local cached_time = field_cache[access_time]
        if not cached_time then
            cached_time = tonumber(access_time)
            field_cache[access_time] = cached_time
        end
        output.time = cached_time
    end

    -- Efficient user field mapping with validation
    if record.user and validate_string(record.user.name) then
        output.user.name = record.user.name
        output.user.type = "User" -- OCSF normalized value
    end

    -- Device field mapping with validation
    if record.device and validate_string(record.device.name) then
        output.device.name = record.device.name
        output.device.hostname = record.device.name -- OCSF normalized hostname
    end

    -- Access activity enrichment
    if record.access_activity then
        local activity = record.access_activity
        output.access = {
            type = activity.app_type,
            reason = activity.reason,
            status = activity.challange_response_status
        }
    end

    -- Process details if available
    if record.process then
        output.process = {
            pid = tonumber(record.process.pid),
            ppid = tonumber(record.process.ppid)
        }
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not validate_number(output.class_uid) then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    -- Ensure timestamp exists
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Clear empty tables for efficiency
    for k, v in pairs(output) do
        if type(v) == "table" and next(v) == nil then
            output[k] = nil
        end
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

-- Cache cleanup helper
function clear_cache()
    field_cache = {}
end
